summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed for Quran listening and Settings adhan test flows after audio-layer refactor and version bump to 3.2.0.

ui_bugs.issue: "Test Adhan Now" and "Test Notification" buttons do not expose data-testid attributes, reducing e2e selector reliability for critical audio/notification checks.
ui_bugs.selector: button text=اختبر الأذان الآن / Test Adhan Now

integration_issues.issue: Desktop Chromium automation passed, but physical-device behavior (autoplay policy/background limits) cannot be fully validated in this environment.

action_items: Add data-testid for Settings audio/notification test buttons to stabilize automated regressions.
Run real-device validation on Android Chrome and iOS Safari for /surah/7?mode=listening and Settings adhan test, including foreground/background app states.
Optional cleanup: silence non-critical runtime warning for missing Supabase env vars when auth features are intentionally disabled.
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage is very large (2200+ lines), increasing regression risk in audio/notification settings; split into focused sections/components.
Critical interactive controls still partially miss data-testid coverage, limiting maintainable UI test automation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on Chromium: listening play button exists and toggles state, Settings 'Test Adhan Now' click works without critical runtime error, version badge shows v3.2.0, and production build succeeds. No console/runtime errors found for mobileAudioManager/notifications/service worker paths in this run. Remaining risk is physical mobile platform behavior (Android/iOS autoplay/background restrictions).
rca of the issue: No hard frontend crash reproduced. Remaining uncertainty is platform-level (mobile browser autoplay/background constraints), not a clear regression in current web runtime. Existing environment does not emulate iOS/Android audio policy fully, so unresolved user-facing reports should be validated on physical devices.
